Patch Set 2:

Andreas, is it possible to change "-1" from Lustre Gerrit Janitor?
sanity-quota_55 often fails and this patch helps to avoid failing of later sanity-quota tests that check used space.
Removed reviewer Sebastien Buisson.

Patch Set 2:

(3 comments)

> Andreas, is it possible to change "-1" from Lustre Gerrit Janitor?
 > sanity-quota_55 often fails and this patch helps to avoid failing
 > of later sanity-quota tests that check used space.

Looking at your patch, it appears that this subtest failed all 40 of the test_55 runs, but I see that test_55 is also failing for other patches in Janitor tests.  In the past 4 weeks of review autotest runs I only see 2 test_55 FAILs (these look like later symptoms of test_10 failures due to LU-11544), and 7 crashes due to LU-15021.

What would be very useful is if you could take a look into why test_55 is always failing on Oleg's test system (e.g. a debug patch).  

I've filed LU-15187 to track the Janitor test failures that can be used for the patch, but it isn't clear to me why that test is failing so consistently in the Janitor test environment and not autotest.  I've added some comments to that ticket to see what can be done to fix that issue.

I guess the whole point of this patch is to clean up the left-over files from test_55, so it doesn't make sense to avoid changing that subtest so that the -1 is not triggered by Gerrit Janitor...

Patch Set 3:

(16 comments)

Definitely a good cleanup patch (+19/-166 lines), but I think more redundant code could be removed from the tests:
- no need for "rm -rf $dir" since this is handled by cleanup_quota_test()
- no need for "return 0" if last check in subtest is in the form "check || action" so that one or the other branch is always taken, since that avoids leaving an extra "false" return code on the stack if "check" is not true

parents.subject: LU-15025 quota: stale edquot after clearing limits

commit.subject: LU-15179 tests: add trap cleanup_quota_test
commit.message:
LU-15179 tests: add trap cleanup_quota_test

Add stack_trap cleanup_quota_test to the tests that
use setup_quota_test. If a test fails without calling
cleanup_quota_test, it may cause later tests to fail
due to used space > 0.

Remove ${tdir}_dom, if exists, in cleanup_quota_test.
sanity-quota_75 doesn't remove test_dom directory.

Test-Parameters: trivial  testlist=sanity-quota
Fixes: a4fbe734("LU-14739 quota: nodemap squashed root cannot bypass quota")
Change-Id: Ife4fd499b427bee79f74a5e172d233fe6a83e240
Signed-off-by: Sergey Cheremencev <sergey.cheremencev@hpe.com>
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/45418
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Alexander Zarochentsev <alexander.zarochentsev@hpe.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
